代入主角，宛如帝王一样，掌控全局，爽，只有自己知道，其他人只能猜测的感觉，既神秘又吸引人"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727221615,"group_id":"7405793614573358104","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"欢迎阅读，随缘，缘分到了就行","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9wCI0ZgKFzZoDeowjVyZE94orHjn0ab+DSmac1x9IIm","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/78eae6f8396349cab29c80dfb0fd6f32~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796114&x-signature=8zS1ZWXvl6F10fqsBXdVoy1THpQ%3D","user_id":"2696454351902999","user_name":"光乖乖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2696454351902999","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1706153190,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7405793614573358104","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神＋龙族＋无女主】
穿越到斩神的世界，林轩发现自己成了林七夜同班同学，还觉醒了金手指。  
 身体中流淌着黑王的血液，成为龙族混血种。    开局觉醒言灵时间零，只要吞噬神秘就能提升血脉，解锁各种能力。
管你是什么境界的神秘生物，就算是神明，我也能吞！
手握七宗罪，直面古神教会，血染苍穹。
“让我加入古神教会？你看着我手里的剑，再说一遍！”  
身具尼伯龙根，塑造四大君主。
仅凭四王，就能轻易横扫大夏以外任意神系。
成就黑王神位，化身死亡之翼。
至邪至恶的气息遮蔽苍穹，把邪神作为养料。
林七夜：“林轩，你不是神明代言人吗，你神明呢？”
林轩：“也是我。”
 “啊？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2747a4b4e7ee8c8a017dc742d65cacaa","author":"树上有本小书","author_id":"","book_id":"7405793614573358104","book_name":"斩神：以黑王之名，铸诸神黄昏！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7405793646005469720","read_count":"67061","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1376832"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"517","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,二次元,无女主,开局,同人,无后宫,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0ddfd8f81f5677d01b0f0e893940f456~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439654&x-signature=HV2MURl74oExqU%2B5m6sDv%2B1NkW0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book 每一个原著角色都还原没有魔改，该属于林七夜的机缘也没有强行霸占，偏向于双主角的感觉吧，有三九那种幽默轻松的风格，至于无女主，如果作者会写感情戏可以加单女主丰富一下内容，但是如果不擅长就不要强加剧情，就这样也很好，总而言之，大力推荐！","text_exts":[{"e":4,"s":0,"text":"斩神同人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774255654493F77BB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227418874233184518974%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227405793614573358104%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727345353,"group_id":"7405793614573358104","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"用心写好每一个故事的普通人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0YKRM0tcHHmaW0ruN4YzK8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/31124c2c96364a7589ccdc288d9f3847~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795043&x-signature=yqrmOqGskZzXwsFbtejTZzaQ23s%3D","user_id":"448197752531015","user_name":"温雨棠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"448197752531015","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7405793614573358104","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神＋龙族＋无女主】

（以下个人感想）
主角和林七夜等人的相处挺有趣的，性格方面也没感觉出什么雷点，就挺正常[思考]，还有根据原著的设定所产生的伏笔，主角是不是凡尘神域的奇迹维持的？剧情也比较紧凑，九十多章就快到沧南市消失了。
总的来说是一部挺好的斩神同人，至少对我来说是，三年前来的番茄，21，22年看的斩神，一两百章追更到九百章左右，结果看不进去，本来也没打算看斩神同人，但因为没找到合口味的书，就来看了，现在感觉找到了当初看斩神时的那份乐趣，希望作者可以稳定更新到故事结束","text_exts":[{"e":134,"s":130,"text":"斩神同人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774255654493F77BB%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227418245355391894297%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227405793614573358104%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%96%A9%E7%A5%9E%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727201008,"group_id":"7405793614573358104","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"降智中","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7yI9kXQG1bgRzu6GGQi+to=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/eb3383e199974d30ad1884a557286b44~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791845&x-signature=L8T9u7iGfqDpn%2FYertwhxCwY4Nw%3D","user_id":"6343715081","user_name":"鸿画"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6343715081","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1719049663,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"la
